Inspired by the past. Designed for the future.

We're Pluto, a group of folks on a mission to maximize your comfort and sleep. Our flagship product is the Pluto Pillow, the first (and still only) pillow custom-built-to-order based on your unique sleep profile. Since then, we've expanded with the guiding principles of offering quality, crazy-comfy products, and customer care so good you'd invite us to your birthday.

AVERAGE RATING BASED ON
Verified
MCH M.2.
“After trying the Casper and Coop pillows, then landing on Pluto — I must say Pluto checks all the boxes. Pluto is the best of the 3.”
Verified
Gretchen F.
I was very skeptical that this pillow would really be everything I was missing in other pillows. I tried it because of the return policy. On the first night I was amazed. I didn't fight my pillow all night. My neck didn't hurt when. I woke up. Amazing! It just keeps getting better as I break it in. I will be ordering one for each member of my family.
Verified
Kayonna C.
The worst. I've never had a pillow so good it's bad I have had the best sleep this past month. I don't toss and turn, not overly hot, i'm late every morning now, friends trying to steal my pillow. I'm at work thinking about taking a nap just terrible. Yup send me another one please for testing purposes.
Verified
M.M.
I have had my pillow for a year and a half. Haven't slept as well in years! It's still in the same condition it was when I got it; it hasn't gotten "saggy" or flattened. I refuse to use any other pillow. They're spendy at first, but I used to have to replace my pillows every 4-6 months, and I've been using mine for >18 months now and it's still going strong!
1 of 4
